name: REST Channel
description: A minimal REST-based channel plugin for OpenClaw. Connect any external web application via simple HTTP requests.

webhookUrl.description: URL where OpenClaw sends outbound messages (assistant replies). Your app must accept POST requests at this URL.

webhookSecret.description: Shared secret for signing outbound webhook payloads (HMAC-SHA256). Set this to verify that requests to your webhook actually come from OpenClaw.

apiKey.description: API key that external clients must include when sending inbound messages to OpenClaw. Acts as bearer token authentication.

inboundPath.description: HTTP path on the Gateway where inbound messages are received.

allowPrivateNetwork.description: Allow fetching media attachments from private/internal network addresses (localhost, 192.168.x.x, etc.). Enable this when your app serves attachments from a local URL.

mediaMaxMb.description: Maximum size in MB for a single media attachment download. Attachments exceeding this limit are skipped.

allowPrivateNetwork.label: Allow Private Network
allowPrivateNetwork.description: Enable if your app serves attachment files from localhost or a private IP
